text:
is a young girl from the Karanes District. She and her brother witness the departure and comeback of the Survey Corps on the 57th expedition.

Appearance

Ellie is a small girl that has golden hair tied into two ponytails with big, brown eyes.

Personality

Not many things are known about her personality. She appears to be an innocent and shy girl, which can be seen when Eren Yeager sees her, making her feeling nervous. Unlike her brother, she seems to be more quiet and calmer, as she did not scream loudly about the Survey Corps.

Story

The Female Titan arc

Upon the return of the Survey Corps from their 57th Expedition to reclaim Wall Maria, Ellie and her brother climb a ladder to see the soldiers over the crowd. Mikasa Ackerman and Eren Yeager notice the siblings watching them and are reminded of how they themselves used to watch the soldiers return from expeditions.
